'''Yus Sh'roth''' was a [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] living in the [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Coruscant underworld]] after it was [[Terraforming/Legends|Vongformed]] into [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]].

==Biography==
A former [[Shaper caste|shaper]], Sh'roth was part of the [[Niiriit Esh]]'s group of renegade [[Shamed Ones]] who followed the [[Jeedai heresy|''Jeedai'' Heresy]], and was one of the older members of the group. As a former shaper, he was a vital member of their community, knowing how to use the [[chuk'a]] they had found and grow a good deal of their food.

Sh'roth was with [[Kunra]] when [[Warrior caste|Yuuzhan Vong Warriors]] attacked their camp. Kunra fled while Sh'roth tried to fight off the warriors, and he was killed. His [[Death/Legends|death]] cry gave [[Nom Anor]] a warning as to the warriors' approach.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}}
